scripts.assets:typecheck: pnpm --filter @forge-trust/appsurface-docs-assets run typecheck && pnpm --filter @forge-trust/razorwire-assets run typecheck
scripts.assets:test: pnpm --filter @forge-trust/appsurface-docs-assets run test && pnpm --filter @forge-trust/razorwire-assets run test
scripts.assets:build: pnpm --filter @forge-trust/appsurface-docs-assets run build && pnpm --filter @forge-trust/razorwire-assets run build
scripts.assets:verify: pnpm --filter @forge-trust/appsurface-docs-assets run verify-generated && pnpm --filter @forge-trust/razorwire-assets run verify-generated
